goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 11:15' and should leave on 'saturday'.
The train should depart from 'london kings cross' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 11:15 and should leave on saturday
The train should depart from london kings cross and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and price
